name: Peanut Butter Buckeyes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the butter, powdered sugar, and peanut butter in a medium bowl; blend until smooth.
2. Roll into 1-inch balls and chill.
3. Place the paraffin and chocolate chips into the top of a double boiler and melt over hot (not boiling) water.
4. Coat the balls by dropping one at a time.
5. Place on waxed paper to cool.
Makes 5 dozen
